title: Fix `--structs-packed` causing not of expected type error

features.name: packed_struct_output_port_with_2d_array_indexing_in_assign
features.description: Code should include a packed struct output port with continuous assignment using 2D array indexing into the struct member

features.name: generate_for_loop_struct_array_assignment
features.description: Code should include a generate for-loop with genvar iterating to assign struct array elements

features.name: nested_struct_array_field_in_continuous_assign
features.description: Code should include assignment to a nested struct array field using 2D index [bn][ii] in continuous assignment

features.name: multi_level_struct_hierarchy_with_arrays
features.description: Code should include a struct containing arrays of other structs, used as module output port
